recipes.intended_use: Clean/base replay guard so synthetic additions do not damage normal visible-note detection.
recipes.promotion_gate: clean cashsnap_v1 validation does not materially regress
recipes.current_blocker: Needs real-gated clean-replay dose test before entering trainable mixes.

recipes.intended_use: Close-up single-note clean replay matched to CashSnap clean val/test framing.
recipes.promotion_gate: improves or preserves clean cashsnap_v1 validation/test under the real-only ablation gate
recipes.current_blocker: Strict real-only ablation failed: test mAP50-95 0.823222 vs 0.835861 real-only (delta -0.012639), led by KHR_50000 geometry and small USD drops.

recipes.intended_use: Geometry-repaired close-up single-note clean replay with KHR in-plane rotation narrowed to match held-out AABB aspect/area.
recipes.promotion_gate: improves or preserves clean cashsnap_v1 validation/test under the real-only ablation gate
recipes.current_blocker: Strict real-only ablation still failed after KHR rotation repair: test mAP50-95 0.821181 vs 0.835861 real-only (delta -0.014680), worst KHR_2000 and KHR_50000.

recipes.intended_use: Diagnostic multi-note stack framing that matches real visible-note scale before any accepted-blend retraining.
recipes.promotion_gate: aggregate real-vs-synthetic visible-note geometry passes, then per-class aspect and real stress utility must pass before trainable-candidate use
recipes.current_blocker: Probe fixes aggregate scale, and a 40-image pool confirms per-class aspect drift is led by USD_20, USD_10, and KHR_10000 while KHR_50000 aspect is no longer the geometry blocker; diagnostic only until class-shape diversity and real transfer are proven.

recipes.intended_use: Diagnostic close-up stack replay with class-conditioned in-plane pose bands tuned from real-vs-WebGL visible-box aspect gaps.
recipes.promotion_gate: per-class visible-box aspect and aggregate real-vs-synthetic geometry pass before any trainable-candidate use
recipes.current_blocker: Final-code v4 passes the declared aggregate/coarse per-class geometry diagnostic gate, but strict per-class geometry still fails. A larger pool80 confirms stable blockers: KHR_10000 aspect -0.575, KHR_20000 aspect -0.311, and USD_50 area -0.332; diagnostic only until class-specific visibility/scale/occlusion policy and real transfer are proven.

recipes.intended_use: Counter-stack overlap training candidate with visible-only labels and fragment metadata.
recipes.promotion_gate: improves shop-overlap same-class/count metrics over no-synthetic and matched 2.5D baselines
recipes.current_blocker: Needs hard-negative dose and real-gated P1 training comparison.

recipes.intended_use: Full-schema handheld fan geometry and fragment-count stress data.
recipes.promotion_gate: real fan metrics improve while parent fusion avoids repeated-note merge errors
recipes.current_blocker: Needs real phone fan benchmark slices beyond stress-only examples.

recipes.intended_use: Stress repeated same-denomination bills inside one handheld fan so count/fusion logic does not merge physical notes.
recipes.promotion_gate: same-class repeat count metrics improve while parent fusion preserves physical instances and clean/browser guardrails hold
recipes.current_blocker: Balanced subset selection packages 12 fan images from a 20-image render pool for repeat-count stress; still needs real repeated-denomination fan validation before trainable-candidate use.

recipes.intended_use: Train or diagnose visible fragment evidence under hand/finger split occlusion.
recipes.promotion_gate: fragment evidence improves partial ID and fusion preserves physical counts
recipes.current_blocker: Hand-occlusion smoke exists with broader primitive finger variation; still needs real hand-occlusion validation.

recipes.intended_use: Bound damp/wet banknote appearance without letting wet sheen destroy visible-denomination evidence.
recipes.promotion_gate: wet-note stress improves or preserves real damp/handled note recognition while clean and dry overlap guardrails hold
recipes.current_blocker: Diagnostic policy smoke passed visually, but needs catalog-driven repeatability and real damp/handled-note validation before trainable-candidate use.

recipes.intended_use: Stress old, dirty, creased, and edge-worn note appearances while keeping exact visible labels.
recipes.promotion_gate: heavy-wear stress improves real handled/old-note robustness without increasing old/common KHR confusion
recipes.current_blocker: Needs catalog-driven repeatability plus real worn-note validation before trainable-candidate use.

recipes.intended_use: Clean-condition control batch for separating geometry/camera effects from dirt, crinkle, and wetness effects.
recipes.promotion_gate: used only as an ablation/control unless it preserves clean real validation and explains condition-policy deltas
recipes.current_blocker: Clean close-up synthetic previously regressed real-only ablation; this control is diagnostic until a bounded model probe proves value.

recipes.intended_use: Human-identifiable thin edge/sliver recognition, especially KHR_5000 and KHR_20000.
recipes.promotion_gate: partial ID improves without broad false positives
recipes.current_blocker: Thin-edge smoke exists; still needs unknown/ignore policy for ambiguous fragments and real-gated transfer proof.

recipes.intended_use: Reduce front/back and old/common KHR class swaps.
recipes.promotion_gate: old/common KHR confusion drops without clean-validation regression
recipes.current_blocker: Needs reviewed real confusion gates and bounded training comparison before promotion.

recipes.intended_use: Target weak/rare KHR class support without oversampling artifacts.
recipes.promotion_gate: rare-class recall improves while common-class false positives stay bounded
recipes.current_blocker: Balanced physical-visible subset selection packages 16 fan images from a 20-image render pool for the class audit; still needs real rare-class validation before trainable-candidate use.

recipes.intended_use: Bound false positives on receipts, wallets, cards, hands, and clean backgrounds.
recipes.promotion_gate: browser guard false positives remain bounded after synthetic mix
recipes.current_blocker: Synthetic props are now diversity-gated, but this still needs reviewed real no-note backgrounds and non-banknote paper/prop captures before promotion.

recipes.intended_use: Audit label-safe phone-like radial lens distortion with RGB, ID masks, and labels sharing the exact same post-render transform.
recipes.promotion_gate: label views pass after shared geometric transform and visual review finds plausible phone distortion without mask/label drift
recipes.current_blocker: Diagnostic only until visual review and real-transfer/model-side tests show lens warp improves target-device robustness.

recipes.intended_use: Light-dose synthetic mix with clean replay for candidate training.
recipes.promotion_gate: real partial/fan improves and clean validation/browser guards stay within budget
recipes.current_blocker: Depends on promoted component recipes and dose sweep.
